judgment.summary: Zscaler offers strong revenue growth and healthy free cash flow but currently operates with negative profit and operating margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 1.01 beat the 0.90 estimate; next earnings date is 2026-05-26.
positives: Revenue growth of 25.9% shows strong top-line momentum.
Gross margin of 76.6% indicates high product profitability.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $1.02B shows the business is generating significant cash.
Total cash of $3.51B is nearly double the total debt of $1.87B.
negatives: Profit margin of -2.3% means the company is currently unprofitable.
Operating margin of -6.2% reflects ongoing operational losses.
Price/Book of 11.24 suggests a high valuation relative to assets.

news.paragraph: Zscaler has shown significant recent momentum, including a 24% price surge over the past month. Options traders should monitor potential growth catalysts such as the rising adoption of Z-Flex and an expanded partnership involving IXT Zero Trust SIM. While the stock has experienced some volatility in line with broader market movements, these developments suggest ongoing interest in its high-growth profile.
